Where we manage

Haven service areas across the Smoky Mountains

We manage cabins and vacation rentals across Sevier County and the greater Smokies. Find your market or cabin community below, each with its own local rules, demand, and plan.

Primary markets

The four core Smoky Mountain markets

Each has a dedicated page covering local rules, demand, and what your cabin can earn.

Gatlinburg

In-town walkability, National Park gateway demand, and the zoning that protects rentals.

Gatlinburg management

Pigeon Forge

Dollywood and family travel, a 12-guest occupancy cap, and grandfathered permits.

Pigeon Forge management

Sevierville

The emerging value market: newer builds, friendlier entry prices, strong revenue.

Sevierville management

Wears Valley

Unincorporated county rules, the Three Strikes policy, and a quieter, view-driven market.

Wears Valley management
More areas & communities

Additional markets and cabin communities

Beyond the four core cities, we manage the quiet-side Townsend market and the Smokies' best-known cabin communities.

Blount County

Townsend

The peaceful side of the Smokies and gateway to Cades Cove. Blount County rules, handled.

Townsend management
Gatlinburg area

Chalet Village

Premium view chalets on Ski Mountain in Gatlinburg, with real winter demand.

Chalet Village management
Pigeon Forge area

Sky Harbor

A central cabin community on the Spur between Pigeon Forge and Gatlinburg.

Sky Harbor management
Sevierville area

English Mountain

Secluded, gated, value-priced cabins on the Sevierville side of the Smokies.

English Mountain management
Specialized management

By property type

Large-group & lodge cabins Luxury cabins

Not sure which applies to your cabin?

Tell us where your property is and a local Haven advisor will walk through the local rules and what it can earn.

Book a Call About Your Property
Prefer to talk now? Call 865-263-7366

Smoky Mountain vacation rental management, run by a local team. Full-service property management for cabin and vacation rental owners across Gatlinburg, Pigeon Forge, Sevierville, and Wears Valley.

865-263-7366 info@havenvacationrentals.com
